# Trade-Level Dataset Schema

**Generated by:** `out_trade_analysis/export_trades.py`
**Strategies:** V10 (`V8ApexConfig` defaults), V11 (cycle_late_only: aggr=0.95, trail=2.8, cap=0.90)
**Period:** 2019-01-01 → 2026-02-20 (warmup=365d)
**Scenarios:** harsh (50 bps RT), base (31 bps RT)

---

## Column Reference

| # | Column | Type | Unit | Description |
|---|--------|------|------|-------------|
| 1 | `trade_id` | str | — | Deterministic ID: `{strategy}_{scenario}_{seq}` e.g. `V10_harsh_42` |
| 2 | `strategy_id` | str | — | `V10` or `V11` |
| 3 | `symbol` | str | — | Always `BTCUSDT` |
| 4 | `scenario` | str | — | Cost scenario: `harsh` or `base` |
| 5 | `window_id` | str | — | `FULL` = full evaluation period (extensible to WFO window index) |
| 6 | `entry_ts` | str | UTC | ISO-8601 entry timestamp: `2021-11-15T00:00:00Z` |
| 7 | `exit_ts` | str | UTC | ISO-8601 exit timestamp |
| 8 | `entry_price` | float | USD | Weighted-average entry fill price (includes spread + slippage) |
| 9 | `exit_price` | float | USD | Exit fill price (includes spread + slippage) |
| 10 | `side` | str | — | Always `LONG` (V10/V11 are long-only strategies) |
| 11 | `qty` | float | BTC | Total BTC quantity in position |
| 12 | `notional` | float | USD | `qty × entry_price` — approximate position size |
| 13 | `gross_pnl` | float | USD | `net_pnl + fees_total` — PnL before exchange fees (but after spread/slippage) |
| 14 | `net_pnl` | float | USD | Realized PnL after all costs (= `Trade.pnl` from engine) |
| 15 | `fees_total` | float | USD | Sum of exchange fees from all fills in this trade |
| 16 | `return_pct` | float | % | `(exit_price / entry_price - 1) × 100` |
| 17 | `bars_held` | int | bars | Number of H4 bars during holding period |
| 18 | `days_held` | float | days | `(exit_ts - entry_ts)` in calendar days |
| 19 | `mfe_pct` | float | % | Max Favorable Excursion: `(max_high - entry_price) / entry_price × 100` |
| 20 | `mae_pct` | float | % | Max Adverse Excursion: `(entry_price - min_low) / entry_price × 100` |
| 21 | `entry_reason` | str | — | Strategy entry signal (see values below) |
| 22 | `exit_reason` | str | — | Strategy exit signal (see values below) |
| 23 | `entry_regime` | str | — | 6-class analytical regime at trade entry (D1 bar with `close_time < entry_ts`) |
| 24 | `exit_regime` | str | — | 6-class analytical regime at trade exit |
| 25 | `holding_regime_mode` | str | — | Most common D1 regime during holding period (by bar count) |
| 26 | `worst_regime` | str | — | Worst regime encountered during hold (see rank below) |
| 27 | `n_buy_fills` | int | — | Number of BUY fills (initial entry + pyramids) |
| 28 | `n_sell_fills` | int | — | Number of SELL fills (partial reduces + final close) |

---

## Enum Values

### `entry_reason`
| Value | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `vdo_trend_accel` | VDO momentum + price > HMA + acceleration ≥ 0 |
| `vdo_trend` | VDO > threshold, above HMA or oversold |
| `vdo_dip_buy` | RSI < 30 (oversold counter-trend) |
| `vdo_compression` | ATR compression + VDO > scale threshold |

### `exit_reason`
| Value | Description |
|-------|-------------|
| `trailing_stop` | ATR-based trailing stop (3.5× ATR from peak) |
| `emergency_dd` | Per-trade drawdown ≥ emergency threshold |
| `fixed_stop` | Price below entry × (1 - fixed_stop_pct) |
| `regime_off` | Regime flipped to RISK_OFF with immediate exit enabled |
| `structural_breakdown` | N consecutive bars below EMA200 |
| `hma_breakdown` | N consecutive bars below HMA with VDO < 0 |

### Regime Classification (6-class, D1)
| Regime | Priority | Definition |
|--------|----------|------------|
| `SHOCK` | 1 (checked first) | \|daily return\| > 8% |
| `BEAR` | 2 | close < EMA200 AND EMA50 < EMA200 |
| `CHOP` | 3 | ATR% > 3.5% AND ADX < 20 |
| `TOPPING` | 4 | \|close − EMA50\| / EMA50 < 1% AND ADX < 25 |
| `BULL` | 5 | close > EMA200 AND EMA50 > EMA200 |
| `NEUTRAL` | 6 (fallback) | Everything else |

### `worst_regime` Rank Order
Worst → best: `SHOCK` > `BEAR` > `CHOP` > `TOPPING` > `NEUTRAL` > `BULL`

---

## MFE / MAE Methodology

- **Source:** H4 bar highs and lows during the trade holding period
- **MFE** = `max(bar.high for bars in [entry_ts, exit_ts]) - entry_price` as percentage of entry_price
- **MAE** = `entry_price - min(bar.low for bars in [entry_ts, exit_ts])` as percentage of entry_price
- Both are clipped at 0% (can't be negative)
- Uses actual bar high/low, not equity-level NAV

---

## Cost Model

`entry_price` and `exit_price` include spread + slippage (built into fill price).
`fees_total` is the exchange fee component only. `net_pnl` is fully net of all costs.

| Scenario | Spread | Slippage | Fee | Round-Trip |
|----------|--------|----------|-----|------------|
| harsh | 10 bps | 5 bps | 15 bps | 50 bps |
| base | 5 bps | 3 bps | 10 bps | 31 bps |

---

## Fill Matching

Fills are matched to trades by timestamp: `fill.ts_ms ∈ [trade.entry_ts_ms, trade.exit_ts_ms]`.
A single trade may have multiple BUY fills (pyramiding) and one SELL fill (full close).
`n_buy_fills` counts pyramids; `n_sell_fills` is typically 1.

---

## Determinism

`trade_id` is deterministic: same inputs → same sequence number from engine.
CSV files are identical across runs with the same data and code version.
